channel.title: Tag on really.lol
channel.description: Recent content in Tag on really.lol

item.title: Falling Fertility Rates
item.description:
Falling fertility rates mean nearly every country could have shrinking populations by the end of the century.

And 23 nations - including Spain and Japan - are expected to see their populations halve by 2100.

Countries will also age dramatically, with as many people turning 80 as there are being born.

— Fertility rate: ‘Jaw-dropping’ global crash in children being born, James Gallagher for BBC News
